title: senecio denalii
intro: Senecio denalii, also known as tall groundsel, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio denalii include reducing inflammation, easing coughs, and promoting overall respiratory well-being. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
